category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ELP as an IDE-first semantic analysis library and LSP language server for Erlang.
source_facts.description says it is an LSP server and CLI for Erlang.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Erlang Language Platform (ELP).
docs_sources: Official ELP documentation site includes get-started installation documentation.
Official GitHub README points users to the official documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/WhatsApp/erlang-language-platform; repo lookup intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes IDE features, semantic analysis, linters, refactoring tools, and LSP support.
source_facts.description identifies LSP server and CLI for Erlang.
